option.name: bodyKeyValueListJson
jsonDocument
returnDocument
option.value: {"code":"响应码","msg":"响应消息","data":{"pageNum":"当前页码","pageSize":"每页显示的记录数","pages":"总页数","records":[{"account":"邮箱账号","passwordHash":"加密后的密码：显示时替换为星号","nickname":"昵称","avatar":"头像","gender":"性别：1-男 2-女 3-未知","birth":"生日","status":"状态：1-正常 2-已注销","type":"用户类型：1-管理员 2-普通用户","id":"编号"}]}}

option.name: requestInfo
option.value: Request Url: http://localhost:8080/user/page Request Headers: Accept: application/json,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8 User-Agent: Fast Request/2024.1.3.1 Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate Content-Length: 28 Content-Type: application/json;charset=UTF-8 Request Body: {"pageSize":10,"pageNum":30}

option.name: response
option.value: {"code":200,"msg":"success","data":{"pageNum":5,"pageSize":10,"pages":5,"records":[{"id":11,"account":"user11@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"林欣","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/11.jpg","gender":"2","birth":"1990-10-04","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":10,"account":"user10@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"陈曦","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/10.jpg","gender":"2","birth":"1996-03-11","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":9,"account":"user9@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"郑十","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/9.jpg","gender":"1","birth":"1994-06-28","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":8,"account":"user8@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"吴九","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/8.jpg","gender":"2","birth":"1987-08-13","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":7,"account":"user7@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"周八","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/7.jpg","gender":"1","birth":"1991-04-20","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":6,"account":"user6@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"孙七","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/6.jpg","gender":"2","birth":"1993-12-02","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":5,"account":"user5@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"赵六","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/5.jpg","gender":"1","birth":"1985-09-16","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":4,"account":"user4@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"王五","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/4.jpg","gender":"1","birth":"1995-02-27","status":"1","type":"2"},{"id":3,"account":"user3@example.com","passwordHash":"$2a$10$abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv","nickname":"李四","avatar":"https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/3.jpg","gender": option.name: response
option.value:
HTTP状态 404 - 未找到

类型 状态报告

描述 源服务器未能找到目标资源的表示或者是不愿公开一个已经存在的资源表示。

Apache Tomcat/10.1.34
